note: 动机光：用可见结果描述。人物脸型光详见 character_lighting.json

calm.face: loop/宽面：面部打开，阴影边缘柔和，双眼可读
calm.atmosphere_zh: 平静中调空气，暖实用光，软阴影
calm.atmosphere_en: calm mid-key air, soft practical warmth, gentle shadow edges
calm.prompt_zh: 柔和侧前方主光，轻补光，面部建模轻柔，空气安静
calm.prompt_en: soft front-side key, light fill, gentle facial modeling, quiet air

suspicion.face: 窄面/伦勃朗：半明半暗，一侧藏秘密，眼神有一星高光
suspicion.atmosphere_zh: 紧绷中低调，冷辅光，半脸阴影
suspicion.atmosphere_en: tense mid-low key, cool underfill, half-shadow face
suspicion.prompt_zh: 硬一点的侧主光，弱冷辅，半张脸进阴影，眼睛仍有高光
suspicion.prompt_en: harder side key, weak cool fill, half face in shadow, eye specular remains

oppression.face: 窄面/顶光：大面积阴影吞脸，眼睛仍可读
oppression.atmosphere_zh: 压迫低调，硬光切开，暗部深沉
oppression.atmosphere_en: oppressive low-key, hard cut light, deep crushed blacks
oppression.prompt_zh: 硬侧或顶侧主光，近零补光，半脸被阴影吞没，眼仍清楚
oppression.prompt_en: hard side or top-side key, near-zero fill, face half swallowed by shadow, eyes still clear

sources: 收紧主光打在眼或关键物件
revelation.face: 伦勃朗/收紧：真相落在眼睛，周边压暗
revelation.atmosphere_zh: 揭示瞬间反差抬起，周边下沉
revelation.atmosphere_en: contrast lifts on the reveal, world falls off around the eyes
revelation.prompt_zh: 主光收紧打在双眼，周边迅速变暗，反差在真相落地时抬高
revelation.prompt_en: tight key on the eyes, surroundings fall dark, contrast spikes as truth lands

intimacy.face: 蝴蝶/环形软光：柔包裹，低反差，眼神柔和
intimacy.atmosphere_en: intimate warm air, soft light on skin
intimacy.prompt_zh: 近处暖实用光作主光，柔扩散，轻补，面部轻柔高光
intimacy.prompt_en: close warm practical as key, soft diffusion, gentle fill, soft facial highlights

grief.face: 宽面柔低调：可选湿润眼神高光，阴影软
grief.atmosphere_en: desaturated grief air, soft dim key
grief.prompt_zh: 偏暗柔主光，低饱和，安静眼神高光，阴影边缘软
grief.prompt_en: dim soft key, desaturated, quiet eye specular, soft shadow edges

dread.face: 分割/底光慎用：深眼窝感，意图仍可读
dread.atmosphere_zh: 恐惧冷空气，单一硬源，深暗池
dread.atmosphere_en: cold dread air, single hard source, pools of dark
dread.prompt_zh: 单一硬动机光，强负补，冷调，面部造型不安，眼仍有意图
dread.prompt_en: single hard motivated source, strong negative fill, cold grade, uncanny face, intentional eyes

rules: 优先故事内实用光动机
人物镜必须写出脸光造型（半脸/伦勃朗/顶光等可见结果）
用视觉结果描述，不写勒克斯或空泛 cinematic lighting
INSERT/物镜：打材质纹理，不用人像脸谱
look_bible.forbidden 优先于装饰性布光
提示词中光影与情绪氛围优先于设备罗列
